{{Infobox character
| name = Karson
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]]
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Karson]]'s parents and older sister were killed in riots following [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s death five years ago.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c1">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Karson]] practiced with a [[sword]] for three hours a day for four years.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Karson]] was attacked by a shadow that burrowed into his thoughts.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c1" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“A spawn of Urg’naut,” Calder Marten explained. “It burrowed itself into your thoughts.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
